prompt: Logo design on pure black background. A perfect circle with a thick yellow (#FAFA00) border ring. Inside the circle is solid black. In the center, two lines of text stacked: 'MM' on top line and 'AGENCY' on bottom line, both in bold white uppercase. CRITICAL: Both lines use the EXACT SAME typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same weight, same style, same letterform construction for both words. Wide rectangular letterforms, sharp corners. No mixing of fonts. The text fills about 60% of the circle. Clean vector quality, flat design, perfectly centered.
negative_prompt: gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, thin lines, lowercase, rounded font, different fonts for different words, mixed typefaces, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, grunge, noise, texture
